phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cable car station is
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah eh-stah-SYOHN dehl teh-leh-feh-REE-koh?

likely_response.local: Junto al mirador de La Rambleta, arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH LAH rahmb-LEH-tah ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Up the main road, on the left.

responses.english: Up the main road, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH LAH rahmb-LEH-tah ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: Junto al mirador de La Rambleta, arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the hiking trail starts
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿por dónde comienza el sendero de excursión?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, por DOHN-deh koh-MYEHN-sah el sen-DEH-roh deh eks-koor-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: Junto al Mirador de Pico Viejo, a la
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH PEE-koh bee-EH-hoh AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: The start is signposted on the left.

responses.english: The start is signposted on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH PEE-koh bee-EH-hoh AH LAH
responses.french: Junto al Mirador de Pico Viejo, a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book the cable car
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo los billetes del teleférico?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh reh-SEHR-boh LOHS beel-LEH-tehs DEHL teh-leh-FÉ-ree-koh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, right here.

responses.english: At the ticket office, right here.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the summit permit office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina de permisos para la cima?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah oh-FEE-see-nah deh per-MEE-sos PAH-rah lah SEE-mah?

likely_response.local: En el centro de visitantes, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL THEHNT-roh DEH bee-see-TAHN-tehs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the visitor center, on the left.

responses.english: At the visitor center, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL THEHNT-roh DEH bee-see-TAHN-tehs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En el centro de visitantes, a la izquierda.
